zh.lifeSummary: 當Sir Richard Maunsell of Oxwich Castle於1375年出生在英國威爾斯格拉莫爾根奧可維其時，他的父親Hugh De Maunsell35歲，母親Isabel Penrice (Penrys)20歲。他於大約1395年與Lady Elizabeth Turberville在英國結婚。他們至少是3個兒子的父母。他去世於1435年6月30日在英國威爾斯格拉莫爾根享年60歲，埋葬在威爾士格拉莫爾根。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Sir Richard Maunsell of Oxwich Castle于1375年出生在英国威尔斯格拉莫爾根奧可維其时，他的父亲Hugh De Maunsell35岁，母亲Isabel Penrice (Penrys)20岁。他于大约1395年与Lady Elizabeth Turberville在英国结婚。他们至少是3个儿子的父母。他去世于1435年6月30日在英国威尔斯格拉莫爾根享年60岁，埋葬在威尔士格拉莫爾根。

nameMeanings.name: Maunsell
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of Family Names in Britain and Ireland © University of the West of England 2016

variants.name: Mansell
meanings: (of Norman origin): habitational name from Old French mansel ‘inhabitant of Le Mans or the surrounding area of Maine’. The place was originally named in Latin (ad) Ceromannos, from the name of the Gaulish tribe living there, the Ceromanni. The name was shortened to Celmans and then became Le Mans as a result of the mistaken identification of the first syllable with the Old French demonstrative adjective.
status name for a particular type of feudal tenant, Anglo-Norman French mansel, one who occupied a manse (from Late Latin mansa ‘dwelling’), a measure of land sufficient to support one family.

nameMeanings.name: Richard
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: One of the most enduringly successful of the Old French personal names introduced into Britain by the Normans. It is of Germanic (Frankish) origin, derived from rīc ‘power’ + hard ‘strong, hardy’. It has enjoyed continuous popularity in England from the Conquest to the present day, influenced by the fact that it was borne by three kings of England, in particular Richard I ( 1157–99 ). He was king for only ten years ( 1189–99 ), most of which he spent in warfare abroad, taking part in the Third Crusade and costing the people of England considerable sums in taxes. Nevertheless, he achieved the status of a folk hero, and was never in England long enough to disappoint popular faith in his goodness and justice. He was also Duke of Aquitaine and Normandy and Count of Anjou, fiefs which he held at a time of maximum English expansion in France. His exploits as a leader of the Third Crusade earned him the nickname ‘Coeur de Lion’ or ‘Lionheart’ and a permanent place in popular imagination, in which he was even more firmly enshrined by Sir Walter Scott's novel Ivanhoe ( 1820 ).

en.lifeSummary: When Sir Richard Maunsell of Oxwich Castle was born in 1375, in Oxwich, Glamorgan, Wales, United Kingdom, his father, Hugh De Maunsell, was 35 and his mother, Isabel Penrice (Penrys), was 20. He married Lady Elizabeth Turberville about 1395, in England. They were the parents of at least 3 sons. He died on 30 June 1435, in Glamorgan, Wales, United Kingdom, at the age of 60, and was buried in Glamorgan, Wales.

fr.Oxwich, Glamorgan, Wales: Oxwich, Glamorgan, Pays de Galles, Royaume-Uni
fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Sir Richard Maunsell of Oxwich Castle est né en 1375, à Oxwich, Glamorgan, Pays de Galles, Royaume-Uni, son père, Hugh De Maunsell, avait 35 ans et sa mère, Isabel Penrice (Penrys), avait 20 ans. Il a épousé Lady Elizabeth Turberville environ 1395, à Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 3 fils. Il est décédé le 30 juin 1435, à Glamorgan, Pays de Galles, Royaume-Uni, à l’âge de 60 ans, et a été enterré à Glamorgan, Galles.

de.Charlton Kings, GLoucestershire, England: Charlton Kings, Gloucestershire, England, United Kingdom
de.lifeSummary: Als Sir Richard Maunsell of Oxwich Castle 1375 in Oxwich, Glamorgan, Wales, United Kingdom geboren wurde, war sein Vater Hugh De Maunsell 35 und seine Mutter Isabel Penrice (Penrys) 20. Er hat um 1395 in England Lady Elizabeth Turberville geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 3 Söhne. Er starb am 30. Juni 1435 im Alter von 60 Jahren in Glamorgan, Wales, United Kingdom und wurde in Glamorgan, Wales begraben.

ja.lifeSummary: Sir Richard Maunsell of Oxwich Castleが1375年にイギリスウェールズグラモーガンオクスウィチで生まれた時，父Hugh De Maunsellは35歳，母Isabel Penrice (Penrys)は20歳であった。約1395年にイギリスでLady Elizabeth Turbervilleと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも3人の息子の親であった。彼は1435年6月30日にイギリスウェールズグラモーガンで60歳で死去し，ウェールズグラモーガンにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Sir Richard Maunsell of Oxwich Castle(이)가 1375년 영국 웨일스 글램르건 스위치에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Hugh De Maunsell(은)는 35세였고, 그의 어머니 Isabel Penrice (Penrys)(은)는 20세였다. 그는 대략 1395년 영국에서 Lady Elizabeth Turberville(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 세 명의 아들을 두었다. 그는 1435년 6월 30일 영국 웨일스 글램르건에서 60세의 나이로 사망했으며 웨일스 글램르건에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Sir Richard Maunsell of Oxwich Castle nasceu em 1375, em Oxwich, Glamorgan, Gales, United Kingdom, seu pai, Hugh De Maunsell, tinha 35 anos e sua mãe, Isabel Penrice (Penrys), tinha 20 anos. Ele casou-se com Lady Elizabeth Turberville aproximadamente 1395, em Inglaterra. Eles tiveram pelo menos 3 filhos. Ele faleceu em 30 de junho de 1435, em Glamorgan, Gales, United Kingdom, com 60 anos, e foi sepultado em Glamorgan, Gales.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Sir Richard Maunsell of Oxwich Castle родился в 1375 г. в местности оксвич, глэморган, Уэльс, Великобритания, его отцу по имени Hugh De Maunsell было 35 лет, а матери, которую звали Isabel Penrice (Penrys), 20. Он женился на женщине по имени Lady Elizabeth Turberville около 1395 г. в местности Англия. У них было по крайней мере 3 сына. Он умер 30 июня 1435 г. в местности глэморган, Уэльс, Великобритания в возрасте 60 лет и был похоронен в местности глэморган, Уэльс.

Se casó con Lady Elizabeth Turberville aproximadamente 1395, en Inglaterra. Fueron padres de por lo menos 3 hijos. Murió el 30 de junio de 1435, en Glamorgan, Gales, Reino Unido, a la edad de 60 años, y fue sepultado en Glamorgan, Gales.
